name: Clinical Study Report
description: ICH E3-aligned schema for Clinical Study Reports covering efficacy, safety, statistical methods, and study design

elements.label: Primary Efficacy Endpoint
elements.description: The primary measure of efficacy, consistent with protocol definition
elements.example: change from baseline in HbA1c at Week 24

elements.label: Primary Endpoint Timepoint
elements.description: Time point at which the primary endpoint was assessed

elements.label: Primary Statistical Analysis
elements.description: Description of the primary analysis method as executed

elements.label: Missing Data Approach
elements.description: Method for handling missing data in the analysis

elements.label: Treatment Arms
elements.description: List of treatment arms as randomized

elements.label: Total Study Duration (weeks)
elements.description: Total duration of study from first to last visit

sections.title: Primary Efficacy Results
sections.prompt_template: Generate the primary efficacy results section for this CSR, including the primary endpoint results and statistical analysis findings.

sections.title: Statistical Methods
sections.prompt_template: Generate the statistical methods section for this CSR, describing the analysis populations, primary analysis model, and missing data handling.

sections.title: Eligibility Summary
sections.prompt_template: Generate the eligibility criteria summary for this CSR, describing the key inclusion and exclusion criteria and enrollment.

sections.title: Study Design Overview
sections.prompt_template: Generate the study design overview section for this CSR, describing the overall study design, treatment arms, and duration.
